name: Human
notes: Choose one attribute and increase it by 1. Determination and resourcefulness; most widespread people. Healing Rate equals one-quarter Health (round down). Level 4: Health +5; learn one spell or gain Determined (reroll a 1 on a boon die).
languages: Common Tongue; either one additional language or a random profession.

name: Changeling
notes: Faerie doppelgangers who steal identities. Immune: damage from disease; charmed, diseased. Iron Vulnerability (impaired in contact with iron). Shadowsight. Steal Identity (action; look like a Size 1 or 1/2 flesh-and-blood humanoid within short range until used again, incapacitated, or touch iron). Level 4: Health +4; learn one spell or Doppelganger's Advantage.

name: Clockwork
notes: 2019 Revised: Key on your body - turning = creature; stopped = object (Defense 5, Health 15, Str/Agi 0, Speed 0). Key stops when incapacitated or after a round with attack/challenge total 0 or less. Excess damage carries into object Health. Mechanical Body: no eat/drink/breathe/age/undead; cannot swim. Object form suppresses afflictions (duration still ticks). Wind the Clock / Repair Damage let others restore or mend you. Level 4: Health +5; learn one spell or Grind the Gears.

name: Dwarf
notes: Darksight (medium range). Hated Creature (1 boon on attacks vs. chosen hated creature). Robust Constitution (half damage from poison; 1 boon to avoid/remove poisoned). Level 4: Health +6; learn one spell or Shake it Off (heal healing rate and remove fatigued, impaired, or poisoned; once per rest).
languages: Common Tongue; speak, read, and write Dwarfish.

name: Goblin
notes: Faerie exiles. Immune: damage from disease; charmed, diseased. Iron Vulnerability (impaired in contact with iron). Shadowsight. Sneaky (1 boon on Agility challenges to hide or move silently). Level 4: Health +4; learn one spell or Spring Away (triggered retreat when an attack vs. Defense or Agility fails).

name: Orc
notes: Shadowsight. Start with Corruption 1. Level 4: Health +6; learn one spell or Rising Fury (when you take damage, next attack roll before end of next round with 1 boon).
